context.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

oidcErrors.forbidden: Your account is not allowed to access this instance.
oidcErrors.providerError: The identity provider reported an error. Please try again.
oidcErrors.expired: Your sign-in session expired. Please try again.
oidcErrors.stateMismatch: Sign-in could not be verified. Please try again.
oidcErrors.exchangeFailed: Could not complete sign-in with the identity provider.
oidcErrors.invalidToken: The identity provider returned an invalid token.
oidcErrors.noIdToken: The identity provider did not return an ID token.
oidcErrors.missingParams: Sign-in was cancelled or incomplete. Please try again.
oidcErrors.notConfigured: Single sign-on is not configured on this server.
oidcErrors.internal: An unexpected error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
oidcErrors.generic: Single sign-on failed. Please try again.

connect.getStartedDescription: Sign in to connect your broker accounts
connect.terms: By continuing, you agree to our <0>Terms of Use</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>.
connect.privacyFootnote: Your portfolio data never leaves your device. Connect uses secure aggregators to sync transactions directly to your local database.
